contextual.title: Diagnostic Algorithm in Patients With Minor Head Injury
contextual.text:
Summary: The objective of this prospective study is to evaluate the reliability of plain x-rays vs.cranial computed tomography as a screening method for skull fractures and its prognostic value for intracranial bleeding (ICB).
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 head injury, nausea, vomiting 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 no head injury
